name: Additional Cavity Laundry Current Selected Cycle
description: The currently selected cycle of the additional cavity of the laundry machine.

data.name: Selected Cycle

comment: Additional Cavity Laundry Current Selected Cycle: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Additional Cavity Delay Time Remaining Minutes
description:
The amount of delay time remaining in minutes for laundry machine additional cavity.

Depends On
- 0x2200 Machine State must be DelayRun or DelayPause.

data.name: Delay Time Remaining (minutes)

comment: Additional Cavity Delay Time Remaining Minutes: Timer/duration value.

name: Additional Cavity Lid Switch State
description: Current state of the additional cavity door/lid'

data.name: Door/Lid State

comment: Additional Cavity Lid Switch State: Binary enum read-only binary sensor.

name: Additional Cavity Remote Set Delay Start Minutes
description:
Write this ERD to set the delay start time in minutes or start the delay start for laundry machine additional cavity
- 0 through 1440 inclusive are allowed values.
- 0 will start the delay start cycle immediately.

Depends on:
- ERD 0x2200 must be delay run or delay pause.
- ERD 0x2207 must be enabled

Read
- 0xFFFF = Request processed

data.name: Set Delay Start Time (minutes)

comment: Additional Cavity Remote Set Delay Start Minutes: Single numeric writable value.

name: Additional Cavity Remote Status
description: Indicates if an additional cavity cycle can be controlled remotely.

data.name: Remote Status

values.255: Model does not support remote operation

comment: Additional Cavity Remote Status: Binary enum read-only binary sensor.

name: Additional Cavity Remote Stop Cycle Request
description:
Write zero to this ERD to stop the currently running, paused, delay run or delay paused additional cavity cycle.

Depends on:
- ERD 0x2200 must be run, pause, delay run or delay pause.
- ERD 0x2207 must be enabled.

data.name: Remote Cycle Stop Request

comment: Additional Cavity Remote Stop Cycle Request: Enum writable select.

name: Additional Cavity Remote Cycle Selection Request
description: ERD used to request a cycle to be selected by an appliances. After being written, this ERD's value is reset to 0xFF and the currently selected cycle is reflected in 0x2203.

data.name: Selected Cycle

comment: Additional Cavity Remote Cycle Selection Request: Enum writable select.

name: Washer Push Notifications
description:
Byte 0, 1, 2 & 3: Individual bits to be controlled by the firmware when a push notification needs to be sent.
                  All bits must be cleared at the beginning of a cycle.
Byte 4, 5, 6 & 7: Notification Supported bits. If a specific feature bit is set to zero, the notification for that feature is NOT supported for a given platform.

data.name: Oversudsing Notification
Water Level Too High Notification
Pump Filter Blocked Notification
Close Door Notification
No Water Notification
Out of Balance Notification
Invalid Connection Notification
Drum Clean Reminder Notification
Door Locked Notification
Door Unlocking Notification
High Temp Notification
Crease Free Air Notification
Softener Low Notification
Detergent 1 Low Notification
Detergent 2 Low Notification
Cycle Complete Notification
Delayed Cycle Started Notification
Drum Dry Active Notification
Dispenser Open Notification
Reserved
Reserved
Oversudsing Notification Supported
Water Level Too High Notification Supported
Pump Filter Blocked Notification Supported
Close Door Notification Supported
No Water Notification Supported
Out of Balance Notification Supported
Invalid Connection Notification Supported
Drum Clean Reminder Notification Supported
Door Locked Notification Supported
Door Unlocking Notification Supported
High Temp Notification Supported
Crease Free Air Notification Supported
Softener Low Notification Supported
Detergent 1 Low Notification Supported
Detergent 2 Low Notification Supported
Cycle Complete Notification Supported
Delayed Cycle Started Notification Supported
Drum Dry Active Notification Supported
Dispenser Open Notification Supported
Reserved
Reserved

comment: Washer Push Notifications: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Laundry Appliance Fault Push Notifications
description:
Laundry appliance fault notifications occur when a critical fault is active. When a critical fault is active all cycles will be prevented from starting or running.
Byte 0 & 1: Individual bits to be controlled by the firmware when a push notification needs to be sent.
Byte 2 & 3: Notification Supported bits. If a specific feature bit is set to zero, the notification for that feature is NOT supported for a given platform.

data.name: Appliance Fault Notification
Reserved
Reserved
Appliance Fault Notification Supported
Reserved
Reserved

comment: Laundry Appliance Fault Push Notifications: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Mabe - Failure code
